privileged_info_summary: I verified the task operates on the synthetic GNU Health demo database (gnuhealth-50-demo.sql.gz). The target patient 'Ana Isabel Betz' exists in the database and her PUID (Person Unique Identifier) is explicitly confirmed as 'GNU777ORG' from the dump. The required socioeconomic updates ('Software engineer' and 'University') and contact information (+1-555-482-9371 and ana.betz@example.com) directly match the explicit target values provided in the task description, and 'Software engineer' and 'University' are confirmed as valid selection options in the GNU Health database.
